market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Hackers are actively exploiting a bug in cPanel, used by millions of websites
articles.description: Web hosts are scrambling to fix the bug under active attack by hackers. One company said hackers have been abusing the bug for months.

articles.title: From Cathie Wood to Cantor Fitzgerald, the big money is betting that Robinhood’s crypto slump is just a temporary speed bump
articles.description: Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest snapped up over 500,000 shares of Robinhood on Wednesday, joining a wave of analysts who believe a surge in April trading activity will outweigh a recent earnings disappointment.

articles.title: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
articles.description: OpenAI will begin rolling out it cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

articles.title: EV startup Faraday Future paid $7.5M to company tied to founder Jia Yueting
articles.description: The perpetually struggling EV company made the payments while being investigated by the SEC. That four-year probe was ultimately closed in March.

articles.title: Bitcoin’s $75K cost basis emerges as key support zone for current bull trend
articles.description: Bitcoin found support above a key investor cost-basis level as spot BTC ETF flows and spot positioning compressed BTC’s price range in preparation for the next trending move.

articles.title: OpenAI announces new advanced security for ChatGPT accounts, including a partnership with Yubico
articles.description: OpenAI is launching additional opt-in protections for ChatGPT accounts. The new security initiative includes a new partnership with security key provider Yubico.

articles.title: Elon Musk testifies that xAI trained Grok on OpenAI models
articles.description: "Distillation" is a hot topic as frontier labs try to prevent smaller competitors from copying their models.

articles.title: FDA approval, fundraising, and the reality of building in healthcare according to BioticsAI founder
articles.description: BioticsAI CEO Robhy Bustami joined Isabelle Johannessen on Build Mode to discuss how the company has navigated a highly regulated space and kept the team motivated while cutting through all the red tape.

articles.title: Google’s Gemini AI assistant is hitting the road in millions of vehicles
articles.description: The move signals Google’s push to bring more advanced, conversational AI into the driving experience.

articles.title: Sentora brings institutional DeFi to the public with the launch of its Smart Yield platform
articles.description: Sentora has announced that Sentora Smart Yield is now publicly available, opening access to its DeFi vault discovery and monitoring platform to all users.

articles.title: Insider trading backlash forces Polymarket to step up surveillance
articles.description: Polymarket has selected Chainalysis to flag suspicious trades as insider betting concerns mount and regulators tighten scrutiny on prediction markets.

articles.title: Stripe introduces Link, a digital wallet that autonomous AI agents can use, too
articles.description: Link lets users connect cards, banks, and subscriptions, then authorize AI agents to spend securely via approval flows.

articles.title: Senator Warren questions Commerce Secretary Lutnick on Tether loan to family
articles.description: Senators Elizabeth Warren and Ron Wyden sent letters to Howard Lutnick and Tether CEO Paulo Ardoino asking about a loan Tether reportedly made to Lutnick's family.

articles.title: Three reasons why $3K ETH price target is back for May
articles.description: Despite Ether’s 8% deviation from 10-week highs above $2,460, data suggests that ETH's price could still rise toward $3,000 as a new month begins.

articles.title: Salesforce is crowdsourcing its AI roadmap — with customers
articles.description: Salesforce lets its customers lead its product roadmap with the thinking that if one enterprise customer has a problem, the others likely do too.

articles.title: Bitcoin Coinbase Premium threatens bear flag repeat with BTC price at $76K
articles.description: Bitcoin price action risked repeating January's breakdown despite April being poised to offer the best monthly BTC price gains in a year.

articles.title: 玉米黃素不只能護眼，還有潛力強化抗癌免疫力
articles.description: 近年來免疫系統對癌症治療的重要性日益受重視。免疫檢查點抑制劑（immune checkpoint inhibi […]

articles.title: 穿透塵埃的電波之眼，天文學家如何精確測量獵戶座年輕恆星的質量
articles.description: 恆星的質量決定了整個生命歷程，但對於被塵埃重重包裹的年輕恆星來說，精確測量質量是一大難題。所幸，現在新的電波觀 […]

articles.title: HederaCon 2026 comes to Miami Beach on May 4 — Last chance to join leaders in tokenization and digital finance
articles.description: HederaCon 2026 will take place on May 4 at the Faena Forum in Miami Beach, bringing together leaders from global finance, policy, and enterprise to explore how tokenization, stablecoins, interoperability, and AI-powered financial systems are moving into real-world adoption.

articles.title: Uber taps Hertz to clean, charge, and fix its Lucid Motors robotaxis
articles.description: Hertz is creating a new affiliate company called "Oro Mobility" to provide fleet management solutions "across a range of mobility segments."
